templates.name: Template 1 — Friendly & Chatty
templates.subject: Join the Upland Team!
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I found your profile on {{platform}} and thought you might be interested in something we’re building at Upland.
We currently have a few open roles — Blockchain Engineer, Full Stack Engineer, and Project Manager.

You can check out the details and apply here:
https://forms.gle/GRDaJUGbWdJdnZuN7

The form includes the job descriptions and our whitepaper, so you can get a good idea of what we’re working on.

If you’re interested, feel free to apply through the form and I’ll reach out to you afterward.
You can also connect with me on LinkedIn if you'd like to stay in touch.

Cheers

templates.name: Template 2 — Casual & Personal
templates.subject: Upland is looking for awesome teammates
templates.body:
Hello {{name}},

I came across your profile on {{platform}} and wanted to share something we’re building at Upland.
We have a few roles open right now — Blockchain Engineer, Full Stack Engineer, and Project Manager.

You can see the role details and apply here:

Best

templates.subject: Web3 gaming roles at Upland
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

I came across your {{platform}} profile and wanted to reach out.
We’re building some fun Web3 gaming projects at Upland, and we’re currently looking for people to join the team.
Open roles include Blockchain Engineer, Full Stack Engineer, and Project Manager.

Best
